name: Cherry Cream Puff Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Heat water and butter in a one-quart saucepan until boiling. Add flour and stir until a ball forms (about 1 minute). Remove from heat.
3. Beat eggs into the dough mixture until smooth. Alternatively, place the dough and eggs in a small mixer bowl and beat on low speed for 2 minutes.
4. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet to form an 8-inch ring. Smooth with a spatula.
5. Bake for 50-60 minutes or until puffed and golden. Allow the ring to cool.
6. Cut off the top with a sharp knife, removing any soft dough.
7. Beat milk, sour cream, pudding mix, and almond extract in a small mixer bowl on low speed until blended (about 1 minute).
8. Fill the cream puff ring with the pudding mixture. Spoon half of the cherry pie filling into the pudding.
9. Replace the top of the cream puff ring and spoon the remaining cherry filling on top.
10. Refrigerate until serving time.
Note: To form the ring, trace an 8-inch round layer pan onto a baking sheet.
